THESE ARE EXAMPLE FILES
DO NOT COPY OVER YOUR ORIGINAL FILES

Description:
- This will add between 3-7 Dynamic Infected around the DeerIsle Map at "Objective Type": TARGET Locations.

Files:
- Add the contents of:
	mpmissions/empty.deerisle/env/zombie_territories.xml
  to your servers:
	mpmissions/empty.deerisle/env/zombie_territories.xml
